text: 17. Hot Work is defined as any activity that produces or has the potential to produce a spark or open flame and may include,  but  is  not  limited  to,  welding,  burning,  cutting,  or  grinding.    All  of  Subcontractor's  personnel  or subcontractors shall not perform any Hot Work on the Project Site until Subcontractor or its Sub-Subcontractors have  completed  Contractor's  Safety  Orientation  and  have  read  and  agreed  to  Contractor's  Hot  Work  Policy. Subcontractor  shall  not  perform  any  Hot  Work  at  the  Project  Site  without  obtaining  a  Hot  Work  Permit  from Contractor. Hot Work Permits shall be logged in every morning and closed out prior to leaving Project Site at a location set forth by the Contractor.
